title: Why Do the Jewish, Secular, and Chinese New Years Fall at Different Times?
title_zh: 为什么犹太新年、公历新年和中国新年在不同时间？
description: An exploration of three different New Year celebrations and the philosophies of time they represent — from Rosh Hashana's autumn renewal to Chinese New Year's yin-yang transition to January 1st's arbitrary convenience.
